clusters.justification: This cluster represents the broad functional domain of emotional reactivity, physiological arousal, and subjective feeling states typically mediated by cortical-subcortical salience and affective pathways.
This cluster captures the computation of subjective utility, incentive processing, and motivation-driven decision mechanisms primarily linked to frontostriatal reward circuitry.

This cluster reflects the internally-directed functional axis dedicated to self-referential thought, autobiographical memory, and processing interpersonal information historically mapped to the default brain systems.
